title: Low‑Code Developer (Power Platform)
description:
Build Enterprise‑Impact Solutions at Kyndryl

If you’re passionate about using low‑code tools to create real business transformation, this is the role where you can truly shine. At Kyndryl, you don’t just build small internal apps — you develop enterprise‑grade solutions that modernize operations for large organizations across industries. You’ll work with a global team, solve meaningful challenges, and design intelligent applications that thousands of users rely on.

Unlike other companies where low‑code work is basic or restrictive, Kyndryl gives you full ownership, from requirement discovery to solution design, automation, integration, deployment, and governance. It’s the ideal environment for you to sharpen your Power Platform expertise and accelerate your journey toward becoming an architect or technical leader.

What You Will Do

Your work will shape how users work, collaborate, and automate their processes. You’ll focus on building secure, scalable, and intelligent low‑code solutions using the Microsoft Power Platform.

Here are your key responsibilities:

1) Build and Deliver Modern Business Applications

You’ll design, develop, and deploy Canvas Apps, Model‑Driven Apps, and Power Pages tailored to real business needs.
You’ll build intuitive forms, data‑driven interfaces, and smooth workflows while integrating apps with Dataverse, SharePoint, SQL, APIs, and Microsoft 365 services.
Your apps will simplify work, reduce manual effort, and empower users across the organization.

2) Automate and Optimize Business Processes

You’ll create smart automations using Power Automate — from cloud flows to desktop flows.
You’ll eliminate repetitive tasks, streamline operations, and ensure each automation includes proper error handling, monitoring, and logging so it runs reliably at scale.

3) Design Scalable Data Models and Integrations

You’ll design secure, well‑structured data models using Dataverse or external sources.
You’ll integrate your apps with enterprise systems through standard connectors, APIs, and custom connectors, while ensuring proper governance, roles, and data security protocols are always in place.

Why Kyndryl?

At Kyndryl, you get to build solutions that matter. You’ll work with leaders who value innovation, operate within a culture that prioritizes continuous improvement, and gain opportunities to experiment with new features and technologies. Here, you’re not just building apps — you’re shaping the digital backbone of modern enterprises.

Required Skills & Experience

  • At least 5 years of hands‑on experience building solutions with Power Apps, Power Automate, or other low‑code platforms
  • Strong experience developing solutions using Power Apps (Canvas & Model‑Driven)
  • Hands‑on experience with Power Automate for building and maintaining workflows
  • Solid understanding of Dataverse or other enterprise data sources and data modeling concepts
  • Ability to integrate solutions with Microsoft 365, SharePoint, SQL, APIs, and connectors
  • Strong foundation in application security, governance, roles/permissions, and data access management
  • Experience supporting full SDLC processes including testing, deployment, and performance optimization
  • Ability to work directly with business users to understand requirements and translate them into technical solutions
  • Strong communication skills and the ability to collaborate effectively with technical and non‑technical stakeholders

Preferred Skills & Experience

  • Experience with Power Pages and building external‑facing low‑code applications
  • Familiarity with custom connectors, API integrations, or complex enterprise integration scenarios
  • Understanding of Power Platform environment governance, licensing, and monitoring
  • Experience working with Azure services or cloud‑based application deployments
  • Knowledge of best practices for low‑code architecture, performance tuning, and scalable solution design
  • Professional certifications in Power Platform, Microsoft 365, or related low‑code technologies

postedCompany.description:
Kyndryl is the world's largest provider of IT infrastructure services, dedicated to designing, building, managing, and modernizing the mission-critical technology systems that power the global digital economy. 

Kyndryl operates in over 60 countries, serving a diverse range of industries including banking, healthcare, retail, and telecommunications. The company's expertise spans cloud services, cybersecurity, AI-driven automation, and digital transformation, enabling organizations to enhance resilience, agility, and innovation. With a customer-centric approach, Kyndryl collaborates closely with clients and technology partners to co-create solutions that drive business outcomes and accelerate growth in the digital era.
postedCompany.name: KYNDRYL (SINGAPORE) PTE. LTD.

districts.location: D01 Cecil, Marina, People’s Park, Raffles Place
